title: 5 things God builds in you while you wait
caption:
You want a wife. God wants a man worth entrusting with one.

The wait isn't a delay. It's a construction site.

Here are 5 things God is building in you right now — not despite the waiting, but through it.

James 1:4 doesn't say endure until the wait ends. It says let patience have its perfect work. The wait is the work.

Colossians 2:10: "You are complete in him." Not half a man waiting for a woman to finish the sentence. The guy who needs a relationship to feel whole will hollow out whoever he's in one with.

Luke 16:10: "Whoever is faithful in very little is also faithful in much." The man who leads a home is the man who first led himself. How you treat the checkout clerk. Whether you follow through when no one's watching.

Psalm 46:10: "Be still, and know that I am God." The man who can't sit with quiet sprints toward distraction — screens, noise, or the next girl who makes the emptiness quiet for a while.

1 Corinthians 13 isn't a wedding verse. It's a formation blueprint. God builds that in you through years of choosing rightly when no one rewarded you for it.

Become him first.

—

Comment "built" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

theme: He chases God, not a wife.
